title: polygala carphoides var. carphoides
intro: Polygala carphoides var. carphoides is a traditional herbal plant, also known as Yuan Zhi, which belongs to the family Polygalaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as improving sleep quality, reducing anxiety and depression, and boosting the immune system. Polygala carphoides var. carphoides can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
